name: Calculadora de Drywall
seo_title: Calculadora de Drywall – Chapas, Massa e Parafusos
seo_description: Calcule quantas chapas de drywall, kg de massa corrida e parafusos você precisa. Insira as dimensões da parede e o tamanho da chapa para obter as quantidades exatas.
description: Calculadora 1115. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Joint compound: ~0.5 kg/m² = 8 kg; Tape: ~1.5 m/m² = 24 m
mistakes: Calculating only the net area without adding waste for cuts around outlets
Forgetting ceiling drywall — it uses the same sheet size but needs different screws
Not accounting for double-layer firewall requirements in some rooms
formula_display: Area = Length × Height × layers; Sheets = ceil(area ÷ sheet_size × 1.08)
